====================================================================================================
colordiff
====================================================================================================

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
colordiff is not part of the JxMake program and is not covered by the JxMake licenses.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The colordiff script in this directory is downloaded from:

    https://www.colordiff.org
    https://www.colordiff.org/colordiff-1.0.21.tar.gz

This colordiff script is included in the JxMake distribution package for convenience.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
colordiff is licensed under term of the GNU GPL License. Please refer to 'colordiff-License.txt'
file for more details.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
